name: autotix/drupal-module
description: Drupal module that captures watchdog errors and forwards them to the Autotix webhook for automated Jira/GitHub ticket creation and auto-fix PRs.

suggest.drupal/core: ^10.3 || ^11.0 (declared via .info.yml core_version_requirement; only listed here for Composer-managed Drupal sites)
suggest.drupal/key: ^1.18 (declared as a Drupal module dep via .info.yml; install when adding this module to a Drupal site)
